DT_ItemDescriptionText.ITEM_DESC_Palvolve_EvolutionStone: A mysterious stone humming with life energy. Lets a bonded Pal evolve into a stronger related form once it has reached the required level.
DT_ItemDescriptionText.ITEM_DESC_Palvolve_AdaptionStone: A shimmering stone attuned to elemental forces. Lets a bonded Pal adapt into one of its elemental forms once it has reached the required level.
DT_ItemDescriptionText.ITEM_DESC_Palvolve_Essence_Normal: Concentrated neutral energy, extracted from skill fruits or elemental materials. Used to craft the matching Adaptation Stone.
DT_ItemDescriptionText.ITEM_DESC_Palvolve_AdaptationStone_Norma: A shimmering stone attuned to neutral energy. Lets a bonded Pal adapt into its neutral form once it has reached the required level.
